programme.title: Дневники Темного
programme.desc: Телеканал ТЕТ подготовил для вас нечто очень неожиданное. Проект придется по вкусу всем любителям загадочных мистических историй. События происходят в фантастическом городе Темный. В нем живут вампиры, оборотни и другие существа. Все здесь живет и дышит, даже стены домов. Попасть в этот загадочный город совсем не сложно, а вот покинуть - невероятно сложно. Однажды в город приезжает журналист. Его задача - освещать события, происходящие в Темном. Однако все осложняется тем, что отличить где правда, а где только галлюцинации, в городе бывает невероятно трудно. В каждом выпуске он расследует новые мистические дела. Удастся ли ему раскрыть их и спасти жизни людей? Сможет ли журналист выжить в таинственном городе? А выбраться из него? - Узнавайте в мистическом сериалы "Дневники Темного".

programme.title: Дневники Темного
programme.desc: Телеканал ТЕТ подготовил для вас нечто очень неожиданное. Проект придется по вкусу всем любителям загадочных мистических историй. События происходят в фантастическом городе Темный. В нем живут вампиры, оборотни и другие существа. Все здесь живет и дышит, даже стены домов. Попасть в этот загадочный город совсем не сложно, а вот покинуть - невероятно сложно. Однажды в город приезжает журналист. Его задача - освещать события, происходящие в Темном. Однако все осложняется тем, что отличить где правда, а где только галлюцинации, в городе бывает невероятно трудно. В каждом выпуске он расследует новые мистические дела. programme.title: Страх в твоем доме
programme.desc: Боль и страдания, которые причиняют самые близкие люди, невыносимы. Дом из крепости становится тюрьмой. И в поисках выхода людям приходится идти на самые невероятные поступки. Ни один сценарист не сможет придумать такие сюжетные ходы, которые порой закручивает сама жизнь. В социальной докудраме "Страх в твоем доме" - только реальные истории, случившиеся с реальными людьми. Мы реконструируем события, основываясь на откровенных рассказах их участников, а наши эксперты - юристы и психологи - комментируют их и помогают найти выход из сложных, порой тупиковых ситуаций.

programme.title: Страх в твоем доме
programme.desc: Боль и страдания, которые причиняют самые близкие люди, невыносимы. Дом из крепости становится тюрьмой. И в поисках выхода людям приходится идти на самые невероятные поступки. programme.title: Семейные мелодрамы
programme.desc: Это не выдуманные истории, а реконструкция реальных событий, которые могут случиться с каждой семьей. В каждой семье свои "Семейные мелодрамы", конфликты, накопившиеся проблемы с долговыми ямами, изменами, трудными детьми и конфликтами с родителями. Какой выход из этих ситуаций, достигших наивысшего апогея, когда никто не хочет его искать? Как же тогда жить дальше? Эти фильмы не заканчиваются хэппи-эндом, но, тем не менее, они будут интересны самому широкому кругу зрителей: от самых маленьких до людей в возрасте. Сюжет фильма обычно предполагает некое размышление или обсуждение, потому что он поднимает важные философские вопросы, заставляет задуматься о понятиях "любовь", "дружба", "верность", "предательство". Помимо главной мелодраматической линии отношений героев, фильмы из подборки "Семейных мелодрам" содержат и философский, и морально-нравственный подтекст, и авторскую позицию по ключевым вопросам бытия. Вместе с тем, это не нудное поучительное рассуждение. Ленты также повествуют о личном выборе героя в сложных жизненных обстоятельствах, которые будут близки всем зрителям.

programme.title: Женский доктор
programme.desc: Действие разворачивается в новой современной клинике, которую основал профессор Юрий Климов. Бывшему тестю доктора Романа Широкова остался лишь год до выхода на пенсию, и за это время он должен найти достойного преемника. Но это не главная причина, по которой профессор вновь приглашает Романа работать вместе. Роман Широков – единственный, кто может довести до конца инновационную научную разработку, от которой зависит судьба дочери профессора - Нины. Однако инвесторы и сотрудники клиники не рады появлению нового профессионала.

programme.title: Школа
programme.desc: Успешная бизнес-леди Катя узнает, что её дочь пыталась покончить жизнь самоубийством. Как оказалось, не впервые. Чтобы быть ближе к дочери и понять, чем на самом деле занимаются дети в школе, она начинает работать учительницей экономики. Молодая мама понятия не имела, какие секреты скрываются за стенами обычной школы. Тогда же в учебное заведение приходит новый преподаватель английского - бывший адвокат и сын директора Алекс. У него есть невеста, которая живет в США, но вдруг между ним и Екатериной промелькнула искра. Впрочем, скелеты прошлого всё ещё дают о себе знать и не отпускают героев...

programme.title: Жить ради любви
programme.desc: Это история о том, как ошибки молодости могут повлиять на всю дальнейшую жизнь.

programme.title: Дневники Темного
programme.desc: Телеканал ТЕТ подготовил для вас нечто очень неожиданное. Проект придется по вкусу всем любителям загадочных мистических историй. События происходят в фантастическом городе Темный. В нем живут вампиры, оборотни и другие существа. Все здесь живет и дышит, даже стены домов. Попасть в этот загадочный город совсем не сложно, а вот покинуть - невероятно сложно. Однажды в город приезжает журналист. Его задача - освещать события, происходящие в Темном. Однако все осложняется тем, что отличить где правда, а где только галлюцинации, в городе бывает невероятно трудно. В каждом выпуске он расследует новые мистические дела. Удастся ли ему раскрыть их и спасти жизни людей? Сможет ли журналист выжить в таинственном городе? А выбраться из него? - Узнавайте в мистическом сериалы "Дневники Темного".

programme.title: Семейные мелодрамы
programme.desc: Это не выдуманные истории, а реконструкция реальных событий, которые могут случиться с каждой семьей. В каждой семье свои "Семейные мелодрамы", конфликты, накопившиеся проблемы с долговыми ямами, изменами, трудными детьми и конфликтами с родителями. Какой выход из этих ситуаций, достигших наивысшего апогея, когда никто не хочет его искать? Как же тогда жить дальше? Эти фильмы не заканчиваются хэппи-эндом, но, тем не менее, они будут интересны самому широкому кругу зрителей: от самых маленьких до людей в возрасте. Сюжет фильма обычно предполагает некое размышление или обсуждение, потому что он поднимает важные философские вопросы, заставляет задуматься о понятиях "любовь", "дружба", "верность", "предательство". Помимо главной мелодраматической линии отношений героев, фильмы из подборки "Семейных мелодрам" содержат и философский, и морально-нравственный подтекст, и авторскую позицию по ключевым вопросам бытия. Вместе с тем, это не нудное поучительное рассуждение. Ленты также повествуют о личном выборе героя в сложных жизненных обстоятельствах, которые будут близки всем зрителям.

programme.title: The Magnificent Ambersons
programme.desc: The spoiled rotten and utterly unlikable rich kid George Amberson becomes horrified when his recently widowed mother rekindles her relationship with the wealthy Eugene Morgan, who she left decades earlier in order to marry Georges father. As George struggles to sabotage his mothers new romance, he must deal with his own romantic feelings for Morgans daughter and the consequences of his meddling as his once great family falls into ruin due to his machinations...

programme.title: The Groomsmen
programme.desc: A 30-something man decides to marry his pregnant girlfriend and asks his four best friends to stand with him at the wedding, but as he observes his friends relationship troubles, he wrestles with issues of fatherhood, marriage and growing up.

programme.title: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Two cop partners, who are also best friends attend a domestic disturbance, only for one to accidentaly critically wound the other. The rest of the police force are suspicious that there may have been no accident.

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: Moe Diamond, a money launderer struggling with memory loss sustained in a car crash, goes on the run, evading the police while carrying heaps of stolen cash he knows nothing about. Moe and his partner in crime Bobby "Skunk" Cohen had been given a job by Bobbys uncle Perico, wherein he gave them a sum of $20 million to launder. However, the two are ambushed while doing a side job by corrupt police officers. The two manage to escape the cops, but soon after end up in a car accident.

programme.title: Irish Jam
programme.desc: A South Central L.A. con artist with rap skills tries to keep bill collectors and his lover, with marriage in mind, at bay by entering a poetry contest staged by a small Irish town. Can his rhyming skills help the town and win him the prize money?

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: In December 1941, Japan expands the occupation of its neighbouring countries to Southeast Asia. The railway from Tianjin to Nanjing in East China became a key military transportation route, heavily guarded by Japanese soldiers. Railroad worker Ma Yuan (Jackie Chan) leads a team of freedom fighters. Using his deep knowledge of the train network, he and his men sabotage it, ambushing Japanese soldiers and stealing supplies to feed the starving Chinese. Although the freedom fighters have no weapons of their own, they employ whatever tools are at hand, including a hammer and shovels, loose railway track planks and diverted trains. The local Chinese call the unlikely heroes the "Railroad Tigers". The freedom fighters find themselves on the wrong side of the tracks when the Japanese send reinforcements to Shandong. In an act of defiance, Ma Yuan launches his most dangerous mission yet, blowing up a heavily guarded railroad bridge. When the Japanese learn of the crippling plan, which will derail the war effort, the stakes are raised even higher. After many missed opportunities and missed shots, the bridge is blown up by the ragtag Chinese railroad tigers.

programme.title: True Smile
programme.desc: Sergio, a 26-year-old autistic male is blind and has never seen a smile. He does, however, give everybody a sincere smile every day. A documentary based on the amazing story encapsulated by Sergio Aznarez Rosados life.

programme.title: Lost in Florence
programme.desc: When Eleroo advises Bumblelion to make a wish when getting the biggest part of the wishbone, it means trouble for poor Rhinokey for losing two bank bags of money. Bumblelion starts spending the money and looses his friends while Rhinokey manages to escape from Officer Eaglebeagle. Rhinokey tries to convince Bumblelion to return the bank bags, but Bumblelion decides to run off thinking that Rhinokey wants to steal his money. Soon after, Bumblelion realizes how Rhinokey lost the bank bags and returns the money to the police.

programme.title: Headwinds
programme.desc: Based on Olivier Adams bestselling novel, "Des Vents Contraires," it tells the story of Paul. Since his wife, Sarah, disappeared without a trace, Paul lives alone with his two young children. But a year has passed, a year in which he had to reinvent himself every day—and Paul is exhausted.

programme.title: The Ambassador to Bern
programme.desc: Attila Szaszs political thriller portraying the events of the hostage taking of the Hungarian ambassador to Switzerland in the aftermath of the 1956 Hungarian Revolution. The film was presented at numerous festivals all over the world. It won the Frederico Fellini Award at Tiburon International Film Festival.

programme.title: The Sandman
programme.desc: One fine morning, Benno finds sand in his bed. While he tries to ignore this at first, he soon must realize that he himself is loosing the sand. Day after day the sand increases and soon his time literally starts running short. Finally he is left no choice but to ask Sandra for help, who runs a small coffee shop under his apartment. Although Benno hates her with a passion, he started having dreams of her every night. What could Sandra and the dreams have to do with the sand?

programme.title: Decembers
programme.desc: The ghost of a photojournalist killed during the American invasion of Panama in December 1989 returns exactly ten years later to resolve family conflicts.

programme.title: Cleanskin
programme.desc: Harry (Sam Douglas), a British people arms dealer, is seen in bed with a prostitute named Rena (Shivani Ghai). While toying with Harrys pistol, she unloads it but replaces the empty magazine. Harrys bodyguard Ewan (Sean Bean) is a British Secret Intelligence Service. Harry and Ewan travel to a bank, transporting a briefcase of Semtex. The men are followed by two terrorists, Ash (Abhin Galeya) and Ibrahim (Mens-Sana Tamakloe). Ibrahim approaches Harry and Ewan from the top of a staircase, shooting at them. After Ash shoots Ewan twice, Harry tries to shoot Ash, only to discover there are no bullets in his gun. Ash kills Harry and takes the briefcase of Semtex. However, Ewan manages to shoot Ash in the arm; but, before he can apprehend him, Ash returns fire and escapes with the briefcase.

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: Max Richards, a teenage boy born with a medical condition of being lethally attractive, who is changed forever when he meets Alex, a girl with her own bizarre ailment, who aids him on his quest of self-discovery... without accidentally killing someone.

programme.title: Miss Nobody
programme.desc: Unlucky in love, living at home with her eccentric mom, and stuck in a dead end secretarial job at Judge Pharmaceuticals, Sarah Jane longs for more out of life. Her surprise promotion to junior executive appears to be just the ticket. But with promotion comes a competitive new world of wily, complicated executives, and Sarah Jane begins to eliminate the competition the only way she knows how - murder. During her climb to the top, she unexpectedly falls for the man of her dreams, Detective Bill Malloy - the cop intent on cracking the case of the mysterious deaths at Judge Pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Love Is Not Enough
programme.desc: Samir, must face his parents breakup. While they meet to find the way to tell him, the little Samir surprises them, because he knows perfectly whats happening, putting his own parents into a hard place with his vision of the situation.

programme.title: Riot
programme.desc: Copper Jack Stone purposefully orchestrates a bank robbery in order to be thrown into prison with the notorious Russian kingpin Balam. Balam is more than just a mob criminal; hes a very cunning and dangerous lord who controls the police force from behind bars. Balam lives in prison as a cover for his real power, which is King of the city. His cell is a lavish private room built specifically for him, inaccessible to most in the depths of the prison structure. Even the warden fears venturing into his area of the prison. However, even surrounded by his loyal henchmen and guards in his sectioned off fortress, Balam doesnt know Jack is coming for him to avenge his family, who Balam murdered in cold blood. Balam is tough... but Jack is tougher.

programme.title: Uncle Nino
programme.desc: A distant, slightly dysfunctional family is brought closer together when the fathers long-estranged Uncle Nino comes from Italy to Chicago for a surprise visit.

programme.title: The Adventure Scouts
programme.desc: A coming of age movie about a group of boys and girls called "adventure scouts" who return from a camping trip to discover their small town is being held captive by a gang of motorcycle-riding knuckleheads. Using only their scouting knowledge and camping equipment, the kids take down the gang members one by one, reunite with family members, and restore the communitys sense of pride.

programme.title: McCinseys Island
programme.desc: A former secret agent finds a treasure map and decides to find the loot. But he is not the only one.

programme.title: Timber the Treasure Dog
programme.desc: A boy rises to the occasion with his best friend (a lovable talking dog) to save his home and family.

programme.title: Talea
programme.desc: Summertime. Everybody is excited to go on vacation to Italy. Everybody but Jasmin. Jasmin is yearning something. She wants to be with Eva, her mother, from whom she had to live seperately for a long time. For weeks, Jasmin is trying to get close to Eva. She does not give up, even if shes rejected. After an argument, Jasmin runs away from her fosterhome and convinces Eva to leave the city together and go on a trip. The two get closer -- sometimes as friends, sometimes as mother and daughter. A first joint cigarette, a dance in the village disco, wanderings through the woods. But expectations and needs of the girl and her mother are diverging repeatedly, especially when a man attracts Evas attention and disturbs the growing closeness between mother and daughter.

programme.title: Spooner
programme.desc: Facing eviction from his parents home on his 30th birthday, a socially awkward guy meets the girl of his dreams and creates his own rules for growing up.

programme.title: Cookies Fortune
programme.desc: Cookies Fortune unfolds over an eventful Easter weekend in the small town of Holly Springs, Mississippi. The town residents are peaceful, kind folk--with the exception of Camille Dixon (Glenn Close) - a pushy theatre director with an incredibly shy younger sister, Cora (Julianne Moore), whose estranged daughter Emma (Liv Tyler) has just returned to town. On the heels of her latest play, Camille is shocked to discover that her Aunt Jewel Mae "Cookie" Orcutt (Patricia Neal) has committed suicide. Terrified at the thought of how this will tarnish the family name, she eats the suicide note to make it look like a burglary. This set-up leads the police to one main suspect, Willis Richland (Charles S. Dutton), who also happens to be Cookies best friend. Although the rest of the town is convinced Willis didnt commit the crime, an outside investigator (Courtney B. Vance) isnt so sure. As Easter Sunday and opening night of the play arrive, the truth comes out, revealing more secrets than anyone could have possibly imagined.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The story of Barry Minkow, a young charismatic business man who becomes a wealthy CEO by lying, cheating and stealing his way to the top.

programme.title: 10 Things We Should Do Before We Break Up
programme.desc: Abigail, a self-sufficient single mom meets Ben. They both think every great relationship ends in disaster. On the first date they come up with 10 things to do together before they break up. But the estimated end is not so sure - because fate adds #11 to their list.

programme.title: Foolproof
programme.desc: Kevin, Samantha and Rob live for Foolproof; their own private club where through high-tech, meticulously thought out and executed plans, they pull off the most impossible of heists - all in theory that is. Theyve never actually done it for real. But all that changes when Leo, a cutthroat British gangster, rips off their foolproof plans for a diamond heist and uses it to successfully execute the robbery. Threatening to implicate them, Leo blackmails them to pull off a robbery worth $20 million in corporate bonds.

programme.title: The Good Girl
programme.desc: A discount store clerk strikes up an affair with a stock boy who considers himself the incarnation of Holden Caulfield.Justine is a sullen 30-year-old woman stuck in a dead-end job at the Retail Rodeo department store.In addition to her mind-numbing occupation, Justine also has to contend with her dim-witted husband, Phil, and his partner, Bubba, who work as house painters when they arent smoking pot and staring blankly at the television.Justine sees an opportunity for change, however, when she meets Holden, a fellow Retail Rodeo employee who is even more depressed than herself.The young Holden and Justine soon begin a passionate secret affair, unaware that it may not be so secret after all.

programme.title: Land Of the Blind
programme.desc: A soldier recounts his relationship with a famous political prisoner attempting to overthrow their countrys authoritarian government.

programme.title: Confidence: After Dark
programme.desc: What Jake Vig doesnt know just might get him killed. A sharp and polished grifter, Jake has just swindled thousands of dollars from the unsuspecting Lionel Dolby with the help of his crew: Insideman Gordo, Shills Miles, and Big Al--and two corrupt LAPD officers, Lloyd Whitworth and Omar Manzano. But when both Lionel and Big Al turn up dead, it becomes clear that Lionel wasnt just any mark--as Jake soon learns, he was an accountant for eccentric crime boss Winston King. Never one to shy away from a challenge, Jake offers to repay "The King" by pulling off the biggest con of his career. The mark? Morgan Gillette, a banker with deep ties to organized crime. With so much riding on the outcome, Jake decides to bring in a brash, blonde pickpocket named Lily, who joins the crew in a scheme involving corporate loans, creative accounting, wire transfers and off-shore accounts. Jake and his crew will have to stay one step ahead of both the criminals and the cops to finally settle their debt.

programme.title: Modigliani
programme.desc: American drama, produced in 2004. An American, French, German, Italian, Rumanian, and British co-production. The story of Amedeo Modiglianis bitter rivalry with Pablo Picasso, and his tragic romance with Jeanne Hebuterne.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: Science fiction movie. Canadian sci-fi, produced in 2017. A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

programme.title: Boss Level: Augstākais līmenis
programme.desc: Militārist Rojs ir iestrēdzis laikā - viņam nākas atkal un atkal no jauna izdzīvot dienu, kurā viņš tika nogalināts. Nu viņš katru dienu tiek nogalināts citā veidā - kādu dienu viņu saskalda ar mačeti, pēc tam nogalē ar helikoptera lielgabalu, bet tad divas skaistules superātrā auto ieplānojušas ko pavisam negantu. Iestrēdzis laika cilpā, kurā katru baltu dienu tiek nogalināts, Rojs sāk meklēt iespējas no tās izkļūt.

programme.title: Nemirstīgie
programme.desc: Apsēsts ar valdītkāri, karalis Hiperions grib iznīcināt cilvēku rasi un gāzt Olimpa dievus, kuri ir bezspēcīgi pretoties viņam. Šim nolūkam viņš atbrīvo Titānus no tūkstošgadu ieslodzījuma. Vienīgā cerība uz pestīšanu ir varonis Tēsejs. Nāvīgā cīņā ar Titāniem varoni atbalsta praviete Fedra, vergs Stavros un pats Zevs, bet šķiet, ka Hiperiona spēks ir neuzvarams. Vai Olimpa dievi tiks gāzti?

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Pārgājiens Lahemā nacionālajā parkā.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone filmām.

programme.title: Acis plaši aizvērtas
programme.desc: Pēc tam, kad Dr. Bila Hartforda sieva Alise atzīstas seksuālās fantāzijās par kādu satiktu vīrieti, Bils kļūst apsēsts ar seksuālu kontaktu. Viņš atklāj pagrīdes grupu, apmeklē vienu no viņu sanāksmēm un ātri vien saprot, ko pārdzīvo.

programme.title: Nemirstīgie
programme.desc: Apsēsts ar valdītkāri, karalis Hiperions grib iznīcināt cilvēku rasi un gāzt Olimpa dievus, kuri ir bezspēcīgi pretoties viņam. programme.title: Acis plaši aizvērtas
programme.desc: Pēc tam, kad Dr. Bila Hartforda sieva Alise atzīstas seksuālās fantāzijās par kādu satiktu vīrieti, Bils kļūst apsēsts ar seksuālu kontaktu. Viņš atklāj pagrīdes grupu, apmeklē vienu no viņu sanāksmēm un ātri vien saprot, ko pārdzīvo.

programme.title: Zīmes
programme.desc: Pensilvānijas štatā kopā ar diviem bērniem un brāli Merilinu pavisam mierīgi, neviena netraucēts, dzīvo fermeris Greiems Hess. Taču šo mieru pārtrauc dīvaini notikumi – vispirms kukurūzas laukos parādās gigantiski apļi, un, iespējams, tos tiešām ir radījušas ārpuszemes civilizācijas. Tad ar viņa tuviniekiem sāk notikt dīvainas lietas. Greiemem ir jātiek skaidrībā ar notiekošo, pirms viņa pasaule nav sabrukusi pavisam.

programme.title: Mans puisis - slepkava
programme.desc: Pēc sava drauga pieķeršanas neuzticībā, Marta kļūst mazliet neprātīga. Bet tad viņa iepazīstas ar Frānsisu. Viņš škiet īstais, ideālais vīrtietis, ja vien.. viņš nebūtu profesionāls slepkava. Kad Marta sāk apjaust, ka viņas jaunais puisis nejoko, sacīdams "es iziešu ārā, lai kādu novāktu", lietas kļūst vēl sarežģītākas. Izrādās Frānsisu vajā kriminālie grupēji, kas ir arī viņa iepriekšējie darba devēji. Līķiem krājoties kaudzē, Martai jāizlemj vai viņa grib bēg ko kājas nes vai kļūt par cienīgu partneri savam pusim-slepkavam.

programme.title: Otrā iespēja
programme.desc: Četrdesmitgadniece Maja strādā lielveikalā un cīnās ar neapmierinātību par nepiepildītajiem sapņiem. Pateicoties draugiem, kas pamatīgi piepušķojuši viņas CV un "Facebook" lapā atrodamo informāciju, Maja pašai par pārsteigumu tiek pieņemta darbā kādā prestižā uzņēmumā.

programme.title: Rītdienas karš
programme.desc: Pasaules kausa izcīņas fināla spēle futbolā tiek pārtraukta, jo laukumā uzrodas karavīri no nākotnes - 2051. gada. Viņi paziņo, ka nākotnē cīnās par cilvēces izdzīvošanu ar citplanētiešiem, un viņiem nepieciešami papildspēki, citādi šī cīņa tiks zaudēta. Palīgā karavīriem, lai cīnītos par savas meitas nākotni, dodas arī bioloģijas skolotājs Dens Foresters. Vai viņiem izdosies, vai Dens atgriezīsies tagadnē sveiks un vesels? Galvenajās lomās: Kriss Prats, Ivonna Strahovski, Dž. K. Simonss

programme.title: Dzīvoklis augšstāvā
programme.desc: Pieci precēti puiši slepenībā uztur augšstāva loftu, kur iespējams nodarboties ar afērām. Fantāzija kļūst par murgu, kad viņi uziet mirušas sievietes ķermeni. Turklāt, viens no grupas šajā notikumā ir iesaistīts.

programme.title: Dziļi kosmosā
programme.desc: Kosmosa kuģis ar trīs cilvēku apkalpi dodas divu gadu ilgā misijā uz Marsu, lai izzinātu, vai uz šīs planētas iespējams dzīvot. Jau esot ceļā, viņi atklāj, ka uz kuģa ir ceturtais pasažieris, kurš tur nonācis nejauši. Ir par vēlu, lai atgrieztos, taču kuģa dzīvības uzturēšanas sistēmas ir bojātas, resursi strauji izsīkst, un visiem izdzīvot nebūs iespējams. Komanda nonāk smagas izšķiršanās priekšā. Galvenajās lomās: Anna Kendrika, Daniels Dae Kims, Tonija Kolete

programme.title: Rītdienas karš

programme.title: Beibes
programme.desc: Mūža draudzenes Edena un Dona - viena neprecējusies un vēlas bērnu, otra jau māte - pārvar viņu saikni saraujošus izaicinājumus: Edena pēc vienas nakts sakara vienatnē vēlas ieņemt bērnu.

programme.title: Kolete
programme.desc: Apprecoties ar populāro rakstnieku Villiju, Sidonija Gabriele Kolete no Francijas laukiem nonāk 19. un 20. gadsimta mijas Parīzes intelektuāļu vidē. Vīra pierunāta, Kolete kļūst par viņa rēgu rakstnieci un uzraksta daļēji autobiogrāfisku romānu par dumpīgu lauku meiteni vārdā Klodīne. Romāns gūst lielus panākumus, un Kolete saraksta vairākus tā turpinājumus. Koletes cīņa par radošajām īpašumtiesībām met izaicinājumu sabiedrības priekšstatiem par literatūru, dzimumu lomām, modi un seksualitāti.

programme.title: Solo

programme.title: Altamira
programme.desc: Dzīve un notikumi kāda vīrieša ikdienā, atklājot vienu no 19. gadsimta būtiskākajiem atklājumiem - Altamiras alas.

programme.title: Melnā kaste
programme.desc: Kas notika reisā Dubaija–Parīze, pirms lidmašīna nokrita Alpos? Katastrofas galvenajam izmeklētājam Matjē Vasēram šī ir pirmā nopietnā civilās aviācijas negadījuma izmeklēšana. Vai notikušais ir pilota kļūda, tehniska kļūme vai tomēr terorakts? Rūpīgi izanalizējot melnās kastes saturu, Matjē aptver, ka izmeklēšana jāveic slepenībā. Taču viņš pat nenojauš, cik tālu patiesības meklējumi viņu aizvedīs.

programme.title: Stāsts par Levinu Deivisu
programme.desc: Drāma par vienu nedēļu kāda jauna folka dziedātāja dzīvē, kurš iepazīst Griničvilidžas folkmūzikas pasauli. Ar ģitāru plecā viņš cīnās ar skarbo Ņujorkas ziemu un cenšas kļūt par īstu mūziķi, saskaroties ar šķietami nepārvaramiem šķēršļiem, turklāt dažus no tiem rada viņš pats.

programme.title: Stāsts par Levinu Deivisu
programme.desc: Drāma par vienu nedēļu kāda jauna folka dziedātāja dzīvē, kurš iepazīst Griničvilidžas folkmūzikas pasauli. Ar ģitāru plecā viņš cīnās ar skarbo Ņujorkas ziemu un cenšas kļūt par īstu mūziķi, saskaroties ar šķietami nepārvaramiem šķēršļiem, turklāt dažus no tiem rada viņš pats.

programme.title: Melnā kaste
programme.desc: Kas notika reisā Dubaija–Parīze, pirms lidmašīna nokrita Alpos? Katastrofas galvenajam izmeklētājam Matjē Vasēram šī ir pirmā nopietnā civilās aviācijas negadījuma izmeklēšana. Vai notikušais ir pilota kļūda, tehniska kļūme vai tomēr terorakts? Rūpīgi izanalizējot melnās kastes saturu, Matjē aptver, ka izmeklēšana jāveic slepenībā. Taču viņš pat nenojauš, cik tālu patiesības meklējumi viņu aizvedīs.

programme.title: Altamira
programme.desc: Dzīve un notikumi kāda vīrieša ikdienā, atklājot vienu no 19. gadsimta būtiskākajiem atklājumiem - Altamiras alas.

programme.title: Stāsts par Levinu Deivisu
programme.desc: Drāma par vienu nedēļu kāda jauna folka dziedātāja dzīvē, kurš iepazīst Griničvilidžas folkmūzikas pasauli. Ar ģitāru plecā viņš cīnās ar skarbo Ņujorkas ziemu un cenšas kļūt par īstu mūziķi, saskaroties ar šķietami nepārvaramiem šķēršļiem, turklāt dažus no tiem rada viņš pats.

programme.title: Takas
programme.desc: Šajā dramatiskajā stāstā Mia Vasikovska atveido rakstnieci Robinu Deividsoni. Filma vēsta par Deividsones 2700 km garo ceļojumu pāri Austrālijas tuksnesim. Kopā ar četriem kamieļiem un uzticamo suni viņa devās ceļā no Alisspringsas līdz Indijas okeānam. Pārgājiena laikā sieviete atklās patieso vientulības vērtību, kā arī no jauna atskārtīs, ko nozīmē īstena saikne ar pasauli. Lai iegūtu finansējumu savam piedzīvojumam, Deividsone negribīgi piekrīt, ka to iemūžinās "National Geographic" fotogrāfs Riks Smolans (Ādams Draivers). Lai gan sākumā viņi nesaprotas, jo Deividsone alkst pēc vientulības, taču laika gaitā abu attiecības pārvēršas īstā draudzībā

programme.title: Džūlī un Džūlija
programme.desc: Nora Efrona ekranizē Džūlī Pauelas autobiogrāfisko grāmatu "Džulī un Džūlija". Pavāre amatiere Džulī Pauela izlemj pagatavot visus slavenās šefpavāres Dzūlijas Čaildas (Merila Strīpa) pavārgrāmatā iekļautos ēdienus. Šo procesu gada garumā viņa apraksta savā blogā.

programme.title: Deiva banka
programme.desc: Balstoties uz Deiva Fišvika patiesiem dzīves piedzīvojumiem, filma "Deiva banka" stāsta par to, kā strādnieku šķiras iedzīvotājs no Bērnlijas un pašizveidots miljonārs cīnījās, lai izveidotu kopienas banku.

programme.title: Takas
programme.desc: Šajā dramatiskajā stāstā Mia Vasikovska atveido rakstnieci Robinu Deividsoni. Filma vēsta par Deividsones 2700 km garo ceļojumu pāri Austrālijas tuksnesim. programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Designer Daniel Roseberry and Ina Garten spend the day talking fashion, creating showstopping flower arrangements, and making amazing smash burgers.

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: Hosts and judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Gabe Bertaccini welcome 10 talented chefs to Ciao House, where they will live together in a beautiful Tuscan villa and be tested like never before on their proficiency with Italian cuisine. Two chefs receive a huge advantage going into the next round, and one chef must say "Ciao Ciao" to the villa.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri travels the country diving into some meaty masterpieces starting at a spot in Longmont, Colorado, that serves craft beer and primo pub grub like their piled-high poutine burger. In Dallas, a funky joint mashes up Texas barbecue with pizza to create combos like their potato chip pie. And in Scottsdale, Arizona, a legit Vietnamese spot cooks up specialties like killer clay-pot chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Infused with her warmth and passion for all things family, Joanna Gaines spends time in the kitchen sharing her favorite recipes, where they come from and why she finds herself returning to them time and time again.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Infused with her warmth and passion for all things family, Joanna Gaines spends time in the kitchen sharing her favorite recipes, where they come from and why she finds herself returning to them time and time again.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Legendary violinist Itzhak Perlman joins Ina Garten for cooking and conversation, and Itzhak shares his foolproof recipe for scrambled eggs.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Designer Daniel Roseberry and Ina Garten spend the day talking fashion, creating showstopping flower arrangements, and making amazing smash burgers.

programme.title: Bobbys Triple Threat
programme.desc: Features one competitor per episode who enters Bobbys secret kitchen to compete against professional chefs in three head-to-head rounds. If the competitor can out-cook the titans and earn more points, they take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh hosts a send-off party to destination: Sweden! She whips up a smorgasbord of delightful Swedish-inspired foods, like her sweet Rose Semlor buns with almond bellies and whipped cream toppers, classic savory Swedish Meatballs and a Big Green Salad with Tiny Hasselback Potatoes tossed in spicy Horseradish Dressing. She finishes up with the coolest party dish -- her Smorgastarta that combines salmon salad and egg salad sandwiches in cake form!

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as theyre pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and wholl be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Its Pizza Friday on the farm, and Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are hosting friends for dinner. Mollys making two pizzas using the same delicious dough recipe: Sausage and Kale Pizza and Squash and Ricotta Pizza with fresh squash from the farm. She also makes a Pizza Parlor Salad with Chickpeas to get some greens in, and for dessert, she serves her easy Chocolate Chip Cookie Cake with Buttercream Frosting.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as theyre pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and wholl be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Host Eric Adjepong welcomes three talented fruit experts from across the United States to challenge Chef Alex Guarnaschelli in a battle for the best fruit dish. In round one, the chefs seal their fate by choosing the ingredients everyone will be using, and their pick could give them an advantage or help Alex dominate the competition. After judges Troy Johnson and Lee Anne Wong send one chef home, the remaining competitors amp up their produce game in an effort to claim up to $15,000.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Host Eric Adjepong welcomes three pastry chefs specializing in frozen desserts. These cool treat experts from across America, will have to be strategic when picking ingredients they think will take Alex out in round one. Will these dessert aficionados give Alex a run for her money? In a competitive round two, Duff Goldman and Natasha Case will determine if one of these chefs are cool and collected enough to beat Alex in her own kitchen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri travels the country diving into some meaty masterpieces starting at a spot in Longmont, Colorado, that serves craft beer and primo pub grub like their piled-high poutine burger. In Dallas, a funky joint mashes up Texas barbecue with pizza to create combos like their potato chip pie. And in Scottsdale, Arizona, a legit Vietnamese spot cooks up specialties like killer clay-pot chicken.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship
programme.desc: Four cupcake connoisseurs battle it out in this cooking competition series, hoping to prove they are the supreme cupcake bakers and take home the $10,000 prize. Each of these contestants are undoubtedly talented cupcake designers, but there can only be one winner, and the heat is on to showcase their artistry and flair when it comes to baking these little sweet treats. Hosted by Kardea Brown, the show give the bakers new challenges to complete in each episode, with the poorest performing contestant eliminated at each stage of the competition, resulting in a final showdown between the very best.

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chefs knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: The bakers celebrate the vibrant colors of spring as host Ali Khan challenges them to make colorful and spicy sweets for Holi, an ancient Hindu festival known as "the festival of spring." Then the competitors hope to impress judges Kardea Brown, Nancy Fuller and Duff Goldman and have some fun with cheeky leprechauns as they use a spring green ingredient to create a leaping leprechaun dessert for St. Patricks Day.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Spring is the season of bunnies and chicks. Host Ali Khan challenges the bakers to contemplate the question of which came first, the chicken or the egg, as they create beautiful edible eggs with a surprise flavor and decorative spring chick. Then the bakers face Spring Baking Championships first ever bread challenge as they try to impress judges Kardea Brown, Nancy Fuller and Duff Goldman with their spectacular hot cross bunnies -- giant bread bunnies inspired by the traditional hot cross bun.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship
programme.desc: Four cupcake connoisseurs battle it out in this cooking competition series, hoping to prove they are the supreme cupcake bakers and take home the $10,000 prize. Each of these contestants are undoubtedly talented cupcake designers, but there can only be one winner, and the heat is on to showcase their artistry and flair when it comes to baking these little sweet treats. Hosted by Kardea Brown, the show give the bakers new challenges to complete in each episode, with the poorest performing contestant eliminated at each stage of the competition, resulting in a final showdown between the very best.

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chefs knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.desc: Russias war against Ukraine and Western countries has evolved beyond conventional battlefields. programme.title: Authors of War
programme.desc: Authors of War examines the powerful role writers and journalists play in shaping how conflicts are understood. Through letters, memoirs, reports and historical works, the series explores how those who documented wars helped preserve the experiences of soldiers and civilians. Each episode revisits major conflicts through the eyes of war correspondents, historians and authors whose words captured the realities of battle, the emotions of those involved and the lasting impact of war on societies and collective memory

programme.title: Treasures of the Nation

programme.title: The Great Russian Lie
programme.desc: A documentary series dedicated to debunking the most influential myths of Russian propaganda. The project goes beyond the analysis of ordinary " fake news " to explore the deep historical manipulations that Russia uses as a tool of external aggression and justification of imperial ambitions.

By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

programme.title: Divas naktis seksam
programme.desc: Iespējams, ka vienas nakts sekss ar interneta sarakstē tikko iepazītu puisi nav tā labākā ideja. Bet sniega vētras dēļ iestrēgt ar viņu vienā dzīvoklī pirms pašiem Ziemassvētkiem – tas jau ir par daudz! Vai arī tā ir negaidīta iespēja labāk iepazīt vienam otru? Un pienācīgi atstrādāt šādas tādas kustības gultā?

programme.title: Augstuma ķīlnieki
programme.desc: Pilots transportē maršali, kas pavada uz prāvu bēgli. Kad viņi šķērso Aļaskas savvaļu, pieaug spriedze un tiek pārbaudīta uzticība, jo ne visi lidmašīnā ir tie, par ko uzdodas.

programme.title: Mazgā mani upē
programme.desc: Narkomāni Šelbijs un viņa draudzene Rūbija cenšas atbrīvoties no atkarības un iet cauri ellei. Rūbija ir gandrīz atkopusies, kad viņu uzrunā sīks noziedznieks, kurš iedod viņai narkotikas, jo nevēlas zaudēt klientu. Atgriezusues mājās, Rūbija padodas atkarībai un injicē sev nāvējošu devu. Satriektais Šelbijs nolemj atriebties par mīļotās traģisko nāvi.

programme.title: Baltais zilonis
programme.desc: Bijušais jūras kājinieks Gabriels spiests cīnīties ar savu sirdsapziņu un pārkāpt goda kodeksu, jo viņam jāstrādā mafijas labā. Gabriels izpilda mafijas bosa pavēles, taču, kad viņam ir jālikvidē policiste, emocionālā spriedze sasniedz lūzuma punktu.

programme.title: Bitīte Maija: Medus spēles
programme.desc: Strops satraukti dūc – nupat novākta vasaras medus raža. Varbūt beidzot spiets tiks izraudzīts dalībai Medus spēlēs? Maijas jaukais satraukums zūd, kad viņa uzzina, ka strops nepiedalīsies spēlēs, turklāt puse ražas būs jāatdod spēļu dalībniekiem. Maijai tas šķiet netaisnīgi. Bez stropa karalienes atļaujas viņa grasās lidot uz Zumtropoli pie imperatores un lūgt atļauju piedalīties spēlēs, pārstāvot savu stropu. Cenzdamās pierādīt stropa karalienei, ko bites spēj, Maija apsola gūt uzvaru Medus spēlēs un glābt stropa medu. Karaliene piekrīt, bet atgādina, ka, vedot komandu cīņā, Maijai vispirms jāiemācās uzklausīt citus. Maija piedalās spēlēs kopā ar labāko draugu Villiju un seno biedru vaboļu komandu. Drīz viņa sastop skaudīgo bitīti Vijolīti no Zumtropoles, kura ar viltu cenšas atņemt Maijas komandai uzvaru. Bitītei nākas piedzīvot viltus rūgtumu, taču negodīgā Vijolīte un viņas komanda arī iekuļas ķibelē.

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Mīlīgā mazpilsētiņā atrodas melna māja ar nedzīvu zālāju. Kaimiņi pat nenojauš, ka zem mājas atrodas milzu paslēptuve. Sīku pakalpiņu armijas apsargāts, Grū kaldina plānus lielākajai laupīšanai pasaules vēsturē. Viņš ir iecerējis nolaupīt Mēnesi. Jā, Mēnesi! Grū patīk viss ļaunais. Bruņojies ar samazināšanas lāzeru, sasaldēšanas staru un dažnedažādiem kaujas transporta līdzekļiem braukšanai pa zemi un pa gaisu, viņš iznīdē visu, kas gadās ceļā, līdz kādu dienu sastop trīs bārenītes ar apbrīnojamu gribasspēku…

programme.title: Gariem līdzi
programme.desc: Kad Čihiro vecāki tiek pārvērsti cūkās, viņa spiesta strādāt pirtī, kuru vada ragana. Starp gariem un brīnumainām būtnēm viņa atrod drosmi un labestību. "Ghibli" šedevrs apbur ar emocijām.

programme.title: Karalisks piedāvājums
programme.desc: 2010. gadā pirms Arābu pavasara izmisušam amerikāņu tirgonim Alanam (Toms Henks) pēc mājas zaudēšanas un šķiršanās no sievas dzīvē ir iestājusies krīze. Izmisīgi cenšoties atgūt atpakaļ savu sievu, viņš dodas uz Saūda Arābiju, lai valdībai pārdotu hologrāfisku telekonferences sistēmu. Cieši apņēmies noslēgt līgumu un nepalikt uz sēkļa brūkošā ekonomikā, viņš mācās, kā izturēties svešā kultūrā ar taksometra vadītāja (Aleksandrs Bleks) un vietējā ārsta palīdzību (Sarita Čodrija)

programme.title: Marmelāde
programme.desc: Filma par kādu ieslodzīto, kurš ar savu veiklo kameras biedru dalās paša izdomātā krāšņā, romantiskā bankas aplaupīšanas stāstā un izbēg, apvienojoties ar savas dzīves mīlestību.

programme.title: Roboti
programme.desc: Arī pasaulē, kurā mīt tikai mehāniskas būtnes, ir vajadzīgi izgudrotāji. Rodnijs ir vienkāršs robotpuika, trauku mazgājamās mašīnas dēls, taču viņam ir liels sapnis - sastapt pašu varenāko robotu pasaules personu lielo Veldu. Rodnijs lielpilsētā ierodas tieši lielo pārmaiņu brīdī, kad daudzu robotu dzīve nonāk briesmās. Kopā ar saviem draugiem - izklaidīgo Fenderu un apzinīgo Paiperi - Rodnijs spēj paveikt vairāk, nekā pats iedomājies.

programme.title: Panda Mēness
programme.desc: Pēc sliktām atzīmēm 12 gadus vecais Tiaņs tiek nosūtīts pie vecmāmiņas uz attāliem Ķīnas kalniem. Tur viņš sadraudzējas ar pandu, kuru nosauc par Mēnesi, un šī draudzība aizsāk neparastu piedzīvojumu, kas izmaina viņa ģimenes dzīvi.

programme.title: Kentervilas spoks
programme.desc: Sera Saimona de Kentervila rēgs jau 300 gadus klīst pa savrupmāju, meklēdams drosmīgu pēcnācēju, kurš viņu varētu atbrīvot no lāsta.

programme.title: Madagaskara
programme.desc: Kā lauvam, zebrai, žirafei, nīlzirgam, bariņam pingvīnu, lemuru un pērtiķu tikt cauri Eiropai, nepievēršot sev lieku uzmanību? Alekss, Mārtijs, Melmans, Glorija un viņu draugi pievienojas ceļojošajam cirkam, cerībā atkal nokļūt mājās, Ņujorkā. Melmens iemācīsies staigāt pa virvi, karalis Džūljens neglābjami iemīlēsies... Īsi sakot - viņu mājupceļš būs īsts cirks!

programme.title: Operācija "Black Bag"
programme.desc: Izlūkdienesta aģente Katrīna Vudhausa tiek turēta aizdomās par valsts nodevību. Viņas vīrs, leģendārais slepenais aģents Džordžs Vudhauss, saskaras ar nepiespējamu pārbaudījumu – būt uzticīgam savai laulībai vai valstij.

programme.title: Sliktais leitnants
programme.desc: Glābjot pēc viesuļvētras Katrīna cietuma kamerā iesprostotu cietumnieku, Jaunorleānas policijas seržants Terenss Makdona ieguva apbalvojumu, paaugstinājumu par leitnantu, muguras ievainojumu, kas sāpēs visu atlikušo dzīvi, un pieeju sāpes remdējošām zālēm. Reiz Terenss bija tiešām labs policists, bet nu viena nepareiza izvēle ved pie nākamās, līdz beidzot ne tikai Terensa karjera, bet arī viņa paša dzīvība izrādās briesmās.

programme.title: Spermagedons
programme.desc: Divas sižeta līnijas. Vienā no tām attīstās neveikls, bet sirsnīgs jaunības mīlas stāsts starp Džonu un Lizu, bet otrā skatītājs seko aizraujošam Saimona Spermas un viņa draugu piedzīvojumam ceļā uz kāroto mērķi — Olu. Filma ar humoru un fantāziju pēta pieaugšanu, attiecības un dzīves lielos jautājumus no pavisam negaidīta skatpunkta.

programme.title: Mazulīte
programme.desc: Augsta līmeņa vadītāja liek uz spēles savu karjeru un ģimeni, kad sāk kaislīgas attiecības ar krietni jaunāku praktikantu.

programme.title: Grāmatu zagle
programme.desc: Filma "Grāmatu zagle", kuras pamatā ir pasaulē populārs romāns, ir stāsts par neparastu, enerģisku meiteni, kuru Otrā pasaules kara laikā Vācijā nosūta dzīvot audžuģimenē. Meiteni ieintriģē vienīgā grāmata, ko viņa paņēmusi līdzi, tāpēc viņa sāk kolekcionēt grāmatas. Ar savu jauno vecāku un zem kāpnēm mītošā slepenā viesa palīdzību meitene iemācās lasīt un izveido brīnumainu pasauli, kas iedvesmo viņus visus.

programme.title: Volisas salas balāde
programme.desc: Loterijā vinnējis lielo laimestu, vīrietis cenšas īstenot sapņus – dabūt savus mīļākos mūziķus uz koncertu savās mājās, tālā vientuļā salā.

programme.title: Tauriņa stāsts
programme.desc: Tuvojoties ziemai, monarhu tauriņi migrē uz dienvidiem, lai pārziemotu siltumā. Taču Patrika spārni vēl nav gatavi tālajam ceļam un viņš nevar lidot. Nedomādams padoties, Patriks kopā ar savu labāko draugu kāpuru Mārtiju paslēpjas pārtikas treilerī, kuru velk Dženifera. Tomēr arī viņai ir savas bažas par ceļojumu, jo - tauriņam neierasti - viņu māc bailes no augstuma. Visus trīs gaida daudz piedzīvojumu un sūri gūtu mācību, līdz mērķis būs sasniegts.

programme.title: Mīlestība dejas ritmā
programme.desc: Talantīgā balerīna Bārlova nolēmusi īstenot savu sapni Amerikas mākslas svētnīcā Ņujorkā. Diemžēl iepazīšanās ar svētnīcas realitāti nav īpaši patīkama – pieredzējusī baleta pasniedzēja Oksana skaidri un gaiši pasaka: Bārlova vēl nav ne tuvu pilnībai. Norijusi krupi, meitene nepadodas un piedalās jaunas Brodvejas deju izrādes atlasē. Režisors Zanders pievērš uzmanību Bārlovai un izvēlas viņu mēģinājumiem. Pēc dažām dienām topošās izrādes kodolam pievienojas talantīgais pianists Čārlijs. Tāpat kā Bārlova, viņš ieradies Ņujorkā, lai īstenotu sapni. Puisim un meitenei rodas simpātijas vienam pret otru, bet Zanders nav vienaldzīgs pret meiteni. Bārlova drīz vien sapinas mīlas trīsstūrī. Izrādes mēģinājumi kļūst arvien intensīvāki, slodze aug, un ne Bārlovai, ne Čārlijam neatliek laika nekam citam. Darbs vaiga sviedros, nemitīgā spriedze, sāncenšu nodevība un cīņa bez kompromisiem prasa visus spēkus.

programme.title: Viktorīnu lēdija
programme.desc: Anna ir gudra un aizrautīga televīzijas viktorīnu dalībniece. Kad viņas māte iekrīt pamatīgos parādos, Annai nākas apvienot spēkus ar māsu Dženiju, no kuras viņa laika gaitā atsvešinājusies. Situācija sarežģījas vēl vairāk, kad tiek nolaupīts Annas suns un par viņu pieprasīta izpirkuma maksa. Abām māsām neatliek nekas cits kā doties trakā ceļojumā pāri Amerikas Savienotajām Valstīm ar vienu mērķi: padarīt Annu par neapstrīdamu televīzijas viktorīnu čempioni, lai iegūtu tik ļoti nepieciešamo naudu!

programme.title: Ups! Piedzīvojumi turpinās
programme.desc: Uz Noasa šķirsta kļūst nemierīgi – kuģis pārāk ilgi kuģo pa jūru, zeme nav redzama un pārtikas krājumi sarūk arvien vairāk. Kādu dienu ceļotāji patiešām atklāj salu, taču uz tās ir aktīvs vulkāns, un arī salas iedzīvotāji nav visai viesmīlīgi.

programme.title: Arī divi ir ģimene
programme.desc: Bezrūpīgā brunču mednieka Semjuela dzīvē viss ir vienkārši un viegli, taču kādā jaukā dienā ar mazuli uz rokām uzrodas viena no viņa neskaitāmajām draudzenēm Kristīna. Paziņojusi, ka tā ir viņa meita, Kristīna aizlido uz Londonu, atstājot Semu vienu ar bērniņu. Pēkšņi par tēvu kļuvušais Sems, vēl neatguvies no šoka, kopā ar mazulīti lido uz Angliju cerībā uzmeklēt meitenītes māti. Tā kā meklējumi ir nesekmīgi, Semam atliek vien samierināties ar jauno tēva lomu un vienam audzināt meitu. Taču pēc astoņiem gadiem meitenītes māte tomēr uzrodas….

programme.title: Maskētie spiegi
programme.desc: Superspiegs Lenss Sterlings ir labākais savā profesijā un, būdams dzīvesprieka pilns, viņš ar lielāko prieku katru dienu glābj pilsētas un valstis. Jaunais zinātnieks Volters, kurš apgādā Lensu ar modernām ierīcēm, ir pilnīgs pretstats - būdams vienmēr drūms, viņš cenšas būt nošķirts no visas pasaules un palikt vienatnē ar saviem izgudrojumiem. Taču pienāk brīdis, kad neparastajam pārītim būs jāatrod kopīga valoda, lai ar neticamu brīnumu palīdzību izglābtu pasauli.

programme.title: Tagad mani redzi
programme.desc: Četri jātnieki atkal apvienojas un kopā ar jauno iluzionistu paaudzi cenšas atmaskot dimantu mantinieces globālo naudas atmazgāšanas shēmu, kas kalpo noziedzniekiem.

programme.title: Bestsellers
programme.desc: Untumains pensionēts rakstnieks negribīgi sāk piedalīties savas pēdējās grāmatas veicināšanas kampaņā, lai izpalīdzētu jaunai izdevējai.

programme.title: After. Pēc kritiena
programme.desc: Tesa ir gatava jaunam dzīves posmam. Spožais prestižas koledžas diploms paver jaunas iespējas – meitene atrod sapņu darbu starptautiskā kompānijā. Viņas nodoms pārcelties uz Sietlu nemaz neiepriecina Hārdinu. Viņa neapmierinātība, pārmetumi un mūžīgā greizsirdība sāpīgi ievaino Tesu un rada bažas. Vai ir vērts visu likt uz kārts un upurēt daudzsološu karjeru? Taču kā lai aizmirst kopā pavadītās naktis un kaislīgos skūpstus, viņa ciešos vīrieša apskāvienus un tuvību, kas padara traku?

programme.title: Viktorīnu lēdija
programme.desc: Anna ir gudra un aizrautīga televīzijas viktorīnu dalībniece. Kad viņas māte iekrīt pamatīgos parādos, Annai nākas apvienot spēkus ar māsu Dženiju, no kuras viņa laika gaitā atsvešinājusies. Situācija sarežģījas vēl vairāk, kad tiek nolaupīts Annas suns un par viņu pieprasīta izpirkuma maksa. Abām māsām neatliek nekas cits kā doties trakā ceļojumā pāri Amerikas Savienotajām Valstīm ar vienu mērķi: padarīt Annu par neapstrīdamu televīzijas viktorīnu čempioni, lai iegūtu tik ļoti nepieciešamo naudu!

programme.title: EuroLeague. Playoffs. Real Madrid - Hapoel TA
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: Futbols: Bundesliga. Dortmund - Freiburg
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the weeks action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Real Betis - Real Madrid
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

First Home Fix
programme.desc: Raisa and Austins superpowers are tested as they renovate a house that has undergone a hodgepodge of previous additions and renovations.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: Alison Victoria returns where her design career started to the bright lights and high stakes of Las Vegas! Shes betting on lofty rewards, taking on multi-million-dollar projects and risky flips as she looks to expand her successful design business.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: The seven-episode series follows Carmine, a real estate agent and interior designer, and Mike, a landscape designer, as they each pitch their design plans to clients. The budget is set, so the guys must be persuasive to score a bigger chunk of the dollars to either max out the interiors or make the most of the outdoor spruce up.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Ryan, Crystal and their two daughters live right outside Atlanta in Alpharetta, Georgia. They are tired of the traffic, noise and hectic pace of life, so they are looking to move to the peaceful island of St Simons.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A family wants to move closer to the kids school in Cocoa Beach, Florida, so they have more time on the beach instead of sitting in traffic. They are looking for something thats move-in ready but also a bargain.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A busy couple with three active boys and a baby on the way looks for more room in Indialantic, Florida. Grandpa is also moving in soon so theres no time to renovate, making a turnkey property a must-have.

programme.title: Vintage Flip
programme.desc: Jessie and Tina Rodriguez are living the American dream, taking their passion for vintage homes and turning them into successful flips. In each episode of Vintage Flip , this creative couple will find, buy, restore and market a vintage home. You never know what might be hiding behind hundred year-old walls!

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: Reality series showing American house hunters who are considering joining the tiny-house revolution where people are choosing to live in smaller homes - often less than 55 square metres -and praising their benefits. In this property series realtors present three petite houses to prospective buyers. Some of the homes would be used as permanent residences whilst others could be a retreat to escape to. There are various reasons for the trend for tiny-living; some people are doing it for financial reasons, others are trying to live more ecologically and some yearn for a simpler lifestyle. When the potential tiny-homeowners are faced with the practical limitations of the properties on offer will they take the plunge and embrace the joys of tiny living? Or will they change their minds for more spacious accommodation?

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their propertys full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A Texas couple are looking for a home in the Bahamas. They love the properties in Nassau but may need to reduce their wish list to must-haves.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After years of living in Las Vegas, a couple longs to return home to Slidell, Louisiana. Theyre looking for a place on the water.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. This American reality series follows prospective homebuyers as they venture into this Central American paradise to find their dream property, with the help of expert realtors. Whatever their reasons for moving; sun, sand, surf or simply a change of scenery, the realtors aid the buyers every step of the way, helping them to locate ideal properties that they can either move into or enjoy as a holiday home. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.desc: Robert and Michelle Carvalho are sick of the traffic and noise on Long Island. They are looking for a house on Amelia Island, Florida, that will provide a quiet, unhurried life for their family of four.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A fun-loving couple with three kids and a dog is looking to upgrade their current home on Hilton Head Island, South Carolina. Hes looking for more square footage, while shes looking for an open concept layout and water views.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. programme.title: No Demo Reno

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: This couple loves their 1905 Victorian house. But they dont love the layout, with all the small rooms. They would like to have more room for when the whole family comes to visit. Dave and Jenny completely redo the floor plan, moving the kitchen, living room, and main bedroom. They manage to keep the historic charm while opening up and updating the cute storybook cottage home.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: Just in time for the holidays, Dave and Jenny will gift the Bella Vista Animal Shelter near their hometown of Bentonville, Arkansas, with a very special renovation to get them ready for the busy pet adoption season. After the Marrs complete the modern upgrades, including a refreshed exterior and lobby, new dog kennels, a trendy outdoor space and a custom cat playroom, theyll reopen the decked-out shelter to the community with a festive, holiday-themed pet adoption event. One of the main team members may or may not leave with a new furry family member.

programme.title: Flipping Out With My Dad
programme.desc: Kristyn convinces Pancho to flip two homes on the same block at the same time, but when the cash runs low, the duo must sell one of them fast.

programme.title: Design Down Under
programme.desc: Husband and wife design build team, Richie Morris and Georgia Ezra, create one-of-a-kind, modern designs and bespoke spaces for their clients in Melbourne, Australia while juggling their thriving businesses and family of four.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, theyre keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erins imaginative hand sketches to Bens custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small towns future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Professional dancers Joseph and Susan, along with their two children, are ready to start a new chapter in their lives. They want out of their tiny New York City apartment and to find more space near the beach on Amelia Island, Florida.
